User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the NEU Room Usage Log application.

uid.description: Unique identifier for the User entity, corresponding to the Firebase Authentication UID.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The institutional email address of the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the application (e.g., 'admin' or 'professor').

is_blocked.description: Indicates whether the user's access to the system is currently blocked.

Room.title: Room
Room.description: Represents a physical classroom or room.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Room entity.

room_number.description: The unique identifier or number assigned to the room.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the room record was created.

Log.title: Log
Log.description: Records a professor's check-in and check-out activity.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Log entity.

professor_id.description: Reference to the User entity (professor) who performed the check-in.

room_id.description: Reference to the Room entity where the check-in occurred.

time_in.description: The timestamp when the professor checked into the room.

time_out.description: The timestamp when the professor checked out of the room.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores individual user profiles. UID in path matches UID in document.
